name: Keyword Sufficiency Checker
description: Validate that generated content includes target SEO keywords at the right density and in the right positions (headlines, first paragraphs, meta tags).
usage_notes: Run after content-writer and seo-planner. Checks keyword placement, density, and negative keyword absence. Works without seo-planner data (returns pass with warning). Pure text analysis -- no API calls.

options.name: pass_threshold
options.label: Pass threshold
options.description: Minimum keyword_score (0-1) for the entity to get qa_pass: true.

options.name: head_term_density_min
options.label: Min head term density
options.description: Minimum keyword density for head terms (fraction of total words). 0.01 = 1%.

options.name: head_term_density_max
options.label: Max head term density
options.description: Maximum keyword density for head terms (fraction of total words). 0.03 = 3%. Above this signals keyword stuffing.

options.name: check_negatives
options.label: Check negative keywords
options.description: Fail if any negative keywords from the SEO plan appear in the content.
